business_ideas.idea: American short-form drama app (like Chinese Drama Box, Real Short) - 90 second episodes
Walmart-priced ruck/weighted fitness vest (undercut GoRuck $420 packs)
Plastic-free product line for baby space (cotton diapers, glass bottles)
Nervous system reset/parasympathetic training service (retreat or app)
AI-powered plant biohacking startup using CRISPR/protein-folding (Hollow model)
AI music generation and curation platform (Spotify meets Replit for music)

predictions.text: Mini drama apps will be as big in US as China within 2 years
Rucking becomes mainstream fitness trend, replaces walking for health optimization
Plastic-free trend spreads to clothes, homeware, pans, and baby products
Next breakout social network will be AI-generated content based
AI music generation will commoditize music production like coding tools do
